name: Fase 1 - Start OP
description: Borderwatch to Melve to Vernworth and first core unlock route.
goal_text: Reach Vernworth and prepare Warrior/Sorcerer unlock.

name: Fase 2 - Vernworth power base
description: Essential Vernworth systems: storage shops oxcart portcrystal/ferrystone basics and early loot.
goal_text: Make Vernworth the main base before deeper routes.

name: Fase 3 - Vocation unlocks
description: Unlock high-value vocations in a low-backtracking order.
goal_text: Unlock Warrior Sorcerer and later Arisen-only vocations.

name: Fase 4 - Best early/midgame loot
description: Collect high-value weapons armor rings wakestones and golden trove beetles.
goal_text: Become overpowered before pushing far into Battahl.

name: Fase 5 - Battahl toegang
description: Checkpoint Rest Town to Bakbattahl route and safe access planning.
goal_text: Open Battahl access with minimal wasted travel.

name: Fase 6 - Endgame/late OP route
description: Volcanic Island Dragonforged high-end gear and final prep.
goal_text: Prepare late-game route and high-end equipment loop.
